mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.name, e.department_id, dm.name AS department_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department_master dm ON e.department_id = dm.id ORDER BY e.id
SELECT e.id, e.name, e.department_id, dm.name AS department_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department_master dm ON e.department_id = dm.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET name = #{name}, department_id = #{departmentId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT e.id, e.name, e.department_id, dm.name AS department_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department_master dm ON e.department_id = dm.id
e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND dm.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{department}, '%')
ORDER BY e.id
